_doc: Embedded tactical visuals for The 2026 Customer Acquisition Bible. {palette} resolves at runtime.

channel-mix-matrix.prompt:
Editorial information matrix showing channel mix allocation by 5 vertical types and 5 budget tiers. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word and number exactly as written.
3. No platform brand logos.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "Channel Mix by Vertical x Budget"
SUBTITLE: "No single channel works in isolation in 2026"

A 6-column x 6-row matrix table.

HEADER ROW (cyan pills): "VERTICAL", "$500/MO", "$1K/MO", "$3K/MO", "$5K/MO", "$10K/MO"

ROW 1: "B2B SaaS" | "100% Search" | "70 Search / 30 Meta RT" | "50 Search / 30 Meta / 20 PMax" | "40 Search / 30 Meta / 20 PMax / 10 Demand Gen" | "+ LinkedIn 10"

ROW 2: "Prosumer SaaS" | "100% Search" | "60 Search / 40 Meta" | "40 Search / 30 Meta / 20 TikTok / 10 Demand Gen" | "35 Search / 25 Meta / 25 TikTok / 15 Demand Gen" | "+ Creator licensing 10"

ROW 3: "Pro Services + LSA" | "100% LSA" | "60 LSA / 40 Search" | "50 LSA / 30 Search / 20 Meta" | "45 LSA / 30 Search / 20 Meta / 5 PMax" | "40 LSA / 30 Search / 20 Meta / 10 PMax"

ROW 4: "Medical/Dental" | "100% Search" | "70 Search / 30 Meta" | "60 Search / 30 Meta / 10 PMax" | "55 Search / 25 Meta / 15 PMax / 5 TikTok" | "50 Search / 25 Meta / 15 PMax / 10 TikTok"

ROW 5: "Restaurants/Fitness" | "100% Meta" | "60 Meta / 40 Search" | "50 Meta / 30 Search / 20 TikTok" | "40 Meta / 25 Search / 25 TikTok / 10 PMax" | "35 Meta / 25 Search / 25 TikTok / 15 PMax"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Header pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4, uppercase
- Vertical column (left): bold sans-serif, off-white
- Cell data: medium sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF, smaller size for readability
- Alternating row backgrounds: slightly darker indigo for odd rows

BACKGROUND: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces, no platform logos.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K matrix graphic.

attribution-stack-layered.prompt:
Editorial information graphic showing the 6-layer cross-channel attribution stack as ascending labeled layers. Aspect 5:4.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word exactly as written.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "The 2026 Cross-Channel Attribution Stack"
SUBTITLE: "Pixel-only is now ~40% accurate. Server-side + first-party is the durability layer."

6 horizontal stacked layers, each labeled with the layer name on a cyan pill on the left and the description on the right.

From bottom to top:

Layer 1 (bottom): pill "LAYER 1" header "Click ID Capture" details "fbclid + GCLID + ttclid persisted in CRM"

Layer 2: pill "LAYER 2" header "Server-Side Events" details "Meta CAPI deduped, Google Enhanced Conversions, TikTok Events API"

Layer 3: pill "LAYER 3" header "Hashed User Data" details "SHA-256 email/phone/address client-side, sent via API"

Layer 4: pill "LAYER 4" header "CRM Offline Conversion Sync" details "Within 7 days Meta, 63 days Google, 7-28 days TikTok"

Layer 5: pill "LAYER 5" header "Marketing Mix Modeling" details "Tracks blended channel contribution outside platform numbers"

Layer 6 (top): pill "LAYER 6" header "Incrementality Testing" details "4-week geo holdout in 1 of 3 matched DMAs. Only honest comparison."

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Layer pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4 on translucent dark indigo pill
- Layer headers: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Layer details: medium sans-serif, off-white
- Layer rectangles: rounded rectangles with thin bright cyan outlines, getting slightly narrower as they ascend

BACKGROUND: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces, no platform brand logos, no server icons.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K layered stack graphic.

three-swimlanes-card.prompt:
Editorial reference card showing the 3 audience swimlanes (SaaS / Pro Services / Local) as side-by-side comparison columns. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word and number exactly as written.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "3 Audience Swimlanes (Default $3K/mo)"

Three vertical columns side by side.

Column 1 pill: SAAS
Lines:
"50 Search / 30 Meta / 20 PMax"
"Funnel: lead magnet > demo or trial > activation > paid > NRR"
"Tracking: CAPI + offline conv from CRM"
"Compliance: no PHI, FTC Click-to-Cancel"
"KPIs: CAC payback under 18mo, LTV:CAC > 3, NRR > 110%"

Column 2 pill: PRO SERVICES
Lines:
"50 LSA / 30 Search / 20 Meta"
"Funnel: lead magnet > paid intake > scheduled service"
"Tracking: server-side GTM with HIPAA gateway"
"Compliance: HIPAA, SB 37, state bar"
"KPIs: CPA under 25% of ticket, LTV ratio > 5:1"

Column 3 pill: LOCAL
Lines:
"50 Meta / 30 Search / 20 TikTok"
"Funnel: voucher > visit > continuity / list"
"Tracking: offer codes + intake field"
"Compliance: state subscription rules"
"KPIs: cost/redemption < 10% LTV, 60-day repeat > 30%"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Column pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4 on translucent dark indigo pill, uppercase
- Lines: medium sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF, separated by light dividers

BACKGROUND: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient.
COLUMN BACKGROUNDS: rounded rectangles with thin bright cyan outlines on translucent dark indigo.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces, no platform logos.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K swimlane reference.

ai-agents-priority-card.prompt:
Editorial priority list card showing the 5 places to start with AI agents in the 2026 acquisition stack. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word exactly as written.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "AI Agents Priority Stack (Small Operator)"
SUBTITLE: "Start lowest-risk, highest-impact. Add layers as the stack matures."

A vertical numbered list of 5 priorities, each with a number badge, name, and 1-line use case.

01: "AI ad creative variants" - "Lowest risk, biggest impact on volume requirements"
02: "AI chat for first-turn qualification" - "On landing pages, handles 3-5 turns of qualification"
03: "AI lead scoring on inbound forms" - "Prioritizes top 20% for sales follow-up"
04: "AI voice for inbound call answering" - "Service businesses with predictable inquiry patterns"
05: "AI in outbound" - "Only after the inbound stack is humming"

BOTTOM PANEL: "What does NOT work: AI cold outbound for B2B SaaS at $20K+ ACV. AI replacing the closing call for high-ticket. AI synthetic testimonials."

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Number badges: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4 on small dark indigo circle
- Priority names: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Use case lines: medium sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF (smaller)
- Bottom panel: small italic medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white panel

BACKGROUND: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces, no AI brain icons, no robot icons.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K AI priority card.

compliance-master-matrix.prompt:
Editorial compliance master matrix showing 8 key 2026 compliance domains and which playbooks each affects. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word exactly as written.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "2026 Compliance Master List"

A 3-column table with 8 rows.

HEADER ROW (cyan pills): "DOMAIN", "RULE", "AFFECTS"

ROW 1: "HIPAA" | "Server-side BAA mandatory, no condition URLs" | "All medical playbooks"
ROW 2: "California SB 37" | "Named CA attorney + bar # + real CA office (Jan 1 2026)" | "All lawyer playbooks"
ROW 3: "ABA Rules 7.1-7.5" | "No false comparison, no implied results" | "All legal verticals"
ROW 4: "FTC Click-to-Cancel" | "Federal vacated July 2025, state CA NY apply" | "All continuity offers"
ROW 5: "Stripe chargeback fees" | "$15 + $15 dispute counter-fee, no protection on subs" | "All continuity offers"
ROW 6: "Amazon Prime settlement" | "$2.5B Sept 2025 reset bar on subscription clarity" | "All SaaS continuity"
ROW 7: "TikTok health vertical" | "No targeting on health status, no patient-list lookalikes" | "P28 health verticals"
ROW 8: "iOS attribution" | "7-day click + 1-day view standard since Jan 12, 2026" | "All paid social"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Header pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4, uppercase
- Domain column: bold sans-serif, off-white
- Rule and Affects columns: medium sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Alternating row backgrounds for readability

BACKGROUND: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces, no scales of justice icons, no medical cross icons, no platform logos.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K compliance matrix.

ninety-day-plan-timeline.prompt:
Editorial timeline graphic showing the 90-day acquisition launch plan with milestones. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word exactly as written.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "The 90-Day Launch Plan"

A horizontal timeline with 4 stop markers (Week 1, Weeks 2-4, Month 2, Month 3), each with a card above showing the milestone goals.

Week 1 card: header "SETUP"
Lines: "Pick channel mix" / "Read single-channel playbooks" / "Install attribution stack" / "CRM offline conv sync" / "Compliance copy approved"

Weeks 2-4 card: header "LAUNCH"
Lines: "Ship first ad set per channel" / "Lead magnet + tripwire + thank-you live" / "50-100 ads ship" / "Email sequence configured" / "End of week 2: kill bottom 50%, refresh middle 30%, scale top 20%"

Month 2 card: header "SCALE"
Lines: "Move to Smart Bidding where thresholds met" / "Refresh PMax assets" / "Add retargeting to all prospecting" / "First incrementality test (4-week geo holdout)" / "First MMM run if $5K+/mo"

Month 3 card: header "OPTIMIZE"
Lines: "Annual NRR review (SaaS)" / "LTV math run (services)" / "Refund rate review (low-ticket)" / "Compliance audit" / "Cohort analysis: highest LTV channel"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Stop labels (Week 1, etc): condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4 below each marker
- Phase headers (SETUP, LAUNCH, SCALE, OPTIMIZE): bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF, uppercase
- Line items: small medium sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Cards above timeline: rounded rectangles with thin bright cyan outlines on translucent dark indigo
- Timeline horizontal line: thick bright cyan with dot markers at each phase stop

BACKGROUND: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces, no calendar icons, no clock icons.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K timeline graphic.

fifteen-failures-grid.prompt:
Editorial reference card showing the 15 most common 2026 acquisition failures across the full library, arranged as a numbered grid. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word exactly as written.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "15 Common 2026 Acquisition Failures"
SUBTITLE: "Drawn from across the 5-channel library (P26 to P30)"

5 columns x 3 rows of numbered cards.

ROW 1 (cards 01 to 05):
01 "Enterprise structure on small budget"
02 "Pixel-only above $1K spend"
03 "Optimizing on form fills not pipeline"
04 "PMax without brand exclusions"
05 "Light PMax asset libraries"

ROW 2 (cards 06 to 10):
06 "No creative refresh cadence"
07 "Hook A/B with same headlines"
08 "Editing campaigns mid-learning"
09 "Standard Pixel on healthcare"
10 "CA lawyers no SB 37 disclosure"

ROW 3 (cards 11 to 15):
11 "Cold straight to sales page"
12 "Underpricing the OTO"
13 "No CRM offline conv sync"
14 "SaaS optimizing on signup not activation"
15 "No incrementality test, ever"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Card numbers: large condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4
- Failure names: medium sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF (smaller for fitting)

BACKGROUND: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient.
CARD BACKGROUNDS: rounded rectangles with thin bright cyan outlines on translucent dark indigo.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces, no platform logos, no warning icons.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K failure reference grid.
